```yaml
name: dummybench
full_name: DummyBench — A Synthetic Benchmark for Pipeline Testing
year: 2026
domain: general
languages:
  - en
primary_region: United States
porting_strategy: translated
documentation_excerpts:
  input_ontology: "5-way task taxonomy aligned with US undergraduate edtech [Q1]."
  input_content: "Prompts drawn from US undergraduate coursework [Q2]."
  input_form: "Inputs are UTF-8 text, ~1000 words per item [Q3]."
  output_ontology: "5-way categorical output label set [Q4]."
  output_content: "Ground-truth labels assigned by US-based annotators [Q5]."
  output_form: "Single categorical label per item [Q6]."
verbatim_quotes:
  - id: Q1
    page: 1
    dimension: input_ontology
    text: "The task taxonomy covers five categories common in US edtech."
  - id: Q2
    page: 1
    dimension: input_content
    text: "All prompts are drawn from US undergraduate coursework."
  - id: Q3
    page: 1
    dimension: input_form
    text: "Inputs are UTF-8 text averaging ~1000 words per item."
  - id: Q4
    page: 2
    dimension: output_ontology
    text: "Outputs use a 5-way categorical label set."
  - id: Q5
    page: 2
    dimension: output_content
    text: "Ground-truth labels were assigned by annotators based in the United States."
  - id: Q6
    page: 2
    dimension: output_form
    text: "Each item returns a single categorical label."
```
